organizations.name: NBC Sports Organization
organizations.motto:
🎯 Our Motto

"Play with Passion. Compete with Integrity. Inspire Excellence."

Alternative mottos:

"Where Champions Begin."
"Beyond Competition, Towards Excellence."
"United by Sport, Driven by Passion."
🌟 Our Culture
Integrity and fair play above all.
Respect for players, officials, and spectators.
Inclusive environment welcoming athletes of all skill levels.
Commitment to professionalism and transparency.
Continuous improvement through teamwork and innovation.
Building a strong and supportive sports community.
📋 Organization Rules
All members and participants must demonstrate good sportsmanship at all times.
Respect tournament officials, volunteers, opponents, and spectators.
Discrimination, harassment, or abusive behavior will not be tolerated.
Players must follow tournament schedules and arrive before their match time.
Equipment and facilities must be used responsibly.
Any disputes must be reported to the organizing committee through the proper channels.
The organization reserves the right to modify schedules or rules when necessary.
All participants must comply with the rules of their respective sport.
Fair play and ethical conduct are expected both on and off the field.
Decisions made by tournament referees and officials are final.
organizations.aboutUs: NBC Sports Organization is committed to creating exceptional sporting experiences by organizing professionally managed tournaments and events across multiple sports. We provide athletes of all levels with a fair, competitive, and inclusive platform to showcase their talent while promoting fitness, teamwork, and sportsmanship.

tournaments.name: MARENA tournament
tournaments.venueAddress: Karnataka Badminton Association, Jasma Devi Baham Road, Kaverappa Layout, Vasanth Nagar

tournaments.name: Tennis Tournament
tournaments.venueAddress: Jakkur Main Road, GKVK Layout, Arkavathy Layout, Jakkur

tournaments.name: Summer Championship 2026
tournaments.venueAddress: Karnataka State Lawn Tennis Association - KSLTA, Kasturba Road, Sampangirama Nagar
tournaments.description: Welcome to the Grand Slam Tennis Championship 2026, a competitive tournament bringing together players of all skill levels for an exciting weekend of tennis. The event features professionally organized matches, certified officials, and a fair competitive environment.
tournaments.rules:
All players must report to the venue at least 30 minutes before their scheduled match.
Players arriving more than 10 minutes late may forfeit the match at the referee's discretion.
Valid photo identification may be required during registration.
Matches will follow the official ITF Tennis Rules unless otherwise specified by the tournament committee.
The tournament follows a single-elimination knockout format.
Warm-up time is limited to 5 minutes before the start of each match.
Players are responsible for bringing their own rackets and appropriate tennis attire. Tournament balls will be provided.
Unsportsmanlike conduct, abusive language, or intentional misconduct may result in penalties or disqualification.
Mobile phones and electronic devices must remain silent during play.
Match schedules may change due to weather or unforeseen circumstances. Participants must regularly check for updates.
Any disputes must be reported immediately to the tournament referee. The referee's decision is final.
By participating, players consent to tournament photography and videography for promotional purposes.
